creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
First pass: seems to work fine with p5-IO-Socket-SSL 1.53 and 1.59 .

I will look at this later, and see what happens with 1.70+

are the hosts you are sending email to TLS enabled?

can you try to send an email to 'michael.scheidell@secnap.com'?  using 
mx1.secnap.com.ionspam.net as the smtp host?


-- 
Michael Scheidell, CTO
 >*| * SECNAP Network Security Corporation
